data.body:
Gap analysis amendments:

1. Both files (agent + contract) must be staged in the same commit or contract committed first. Existing task dep ensures ordering; implementing agent should verify both are committed together.

2. shim-exempt: Use exactly '.claude/scripts/dso resolve-stack-adapter.sh'  # shim-exempt: internal orchestration script — do NOT use 'plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-stack-adapter.sh' anywhere in the file outside a fenced code block.

3. .test-index: Add two entries after creating both files:
   - plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md → tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-agent.sh (add to agent's .test-index line)
   - plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-payload.md → tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-agent.sh (add to contract's .test-index line)

4. CLAUDE.md agent table update is NOT in scope for this story — it belongs in story 8163-83a4 (which dispatches ui-designer).
